title: playkube : How to specify infra image
body:
**Description**
when i use 'playkube' to create a pod, how do I specify infra image

**Describe the results you expected:**
Where to configure or where can I specify infra image

comments.body:
I've been able to configure the infra image in `containers.conf`. For rootless containers it lives in `$HOME/.config/containers/containers.conf`.

```
[container@ip-1-2-3-4 ~]$ cat .config/containers/containers.conf
...
[engine]
# Default infra (pause) image name for pod infra containers
infra_image="myinfra.com/pause:1"

# Default command to run the infra container
infra_command="/pause"
...
```

Documented here: https://github.com/containers/common/blob/main/docs/containers.conf.5.md
